turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 89-322, United Steelsorkers of America versus Rawson will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON WHITE
turns.text: The judgment of the Supreme Court of Idaho in this case is reversed. The opinion on file with the Clerk explains the reasons for our judgment. Justice Kennedy has filed a dissenting opinion and he is joined by the Chief Justice and Justice Scalia.
